narrative:
Leavittsville (precinct in Carroll County) has 556 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.8 percentage points.
